message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain

participant "進行役" as Moderator
participant "自分: プレイヤー" as SelfPlayer
participant "隣のプレイヤー: プレイヤー" as NeighborPlayer
participant "隣のプレイヤーの手札: 手札" as NeighborHand

Moderator -> SelfPlayer: 順番を指名する(隣のプレイヤー)
activate SelfPlayer
SelfPlayer -> NeighborPlayer: 手札を出す()
activate NeighborPlayer
NeighborPlayer --> SelfPlayer: 手札
deactivate NeighborPlayer
SelfPlayer -> NeighborHand: カードを引く()
activate NeighborHand
NeighborHand --> SelfPlayer: カード
deactivate NeighborHand
deactivate SelfPlayer

@enduml
